---
title: Equation Anchors Example
format: html
filters:
  - d-morrison/equation-anchors
---

The following unlabeled display equation should include an anchor link on the left:

$$
x^2 + y^2 = z^2
$$

The following labeled display equation also gets an anchor link:

$$
f(x) = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-t^2} \, dt
$$ {#eq-gaussian}

You can also reference it as @eq-gaussian.
